member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.IHdmtOsTestClass
member.remarks: All test classes or test class loaders that will be instantiated by the Test Program Host must derived from this class.

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.IHdmtOsTestClass.InitAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called by HdmtOs after the test is instantiated.
member.param: Cancellation Token to signal an abort was requested

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.IHdmtOsTestClass.VerifyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Not called by the TOS. It is normally called from another test during the InitFlow flow. It should also be called from ExecuteAsync if the parameters have been modified since the InitFlow was executed (by a GUI).
ITestContext.IsDirty can be used to check if the parameters have changed. ITestContext.ClearDirty() must be called to reflect that the parameters are no longer dirty
Exception should be thrown to to fail Verify in HdmtOs, HDMT Site Controller Studio, and Sdk
member.param: Cancellation Token to signal an abort was requested

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.IHdmtOsTestClass.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called by TOS to execute the test.
member.param: Cancellation Token to signal an abort was requested
member.returns: Returns TestExecutionResult specifying port, and bypass

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.IHdmtOsTestClass.PreUnloadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signals that the test is about to be unloaded.
member.param: Cancellation Token to signal an abort was requested

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.ITestContext
member.summary: Provides access to test instance information

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.ITestContext.IsDirty
member.remarks: Must be cleared manually by test class code using

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.ITestContext.CurrentTestCallingPath
member.summary: Current calling path to the test

remarks.para: If the execution of the current test instance is triggered by executing a predefined flow, the first element of this list will be of the form "PredefinedFlowName::FlowName". The rest of the elements of this list will be the flow item names beginning from the starting flow item of the user flow that is linked to the predefined flow and ending with the flow item that is responsible for this test instance being executed.

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.ITestInformation.DllPath
member.summary: Path to the Dll containing the test class

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.ITestParameters.Dirty
member.summary: Parameters that have been updated since the previous test class interaction

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.TestExecutionResult.Bypass
member.summary: True = test will be marked as bypassed False = test will be marked as not bypassed

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.TestClass.BaseTypes.TestExecutionResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.param: True = test will be marked as bypassed False = test will be marked as not bypassed
